title: Oembed
description:
The embedded content from a specified image URL.

This is essentially an ``ImageSerializer`` with some changes to match the oEmbed
spec: https://oembed.com.

version.description: The oEmbed version number, always set to 1.0.

type.description: The resource type, always set to 'photo' for images.

width.description: The width of the image in pixels.

height.description: The height of the image in pixels.

author_name.description: The name of the media creator.

author_url.description: A direct link to the media creator.

license_url.description: A direct link to the license deed or legal terms.
